notes: This ledger is the mechanical PEEL market-signal gate for the ZestStream holding-company goal.

A candidate may not clear or commit formation cash until five qualified prospect interviews have would_buy=true, medium-or-strong urgency, a redacted price point, a pain point, a current alternative, and an evidence reference.
next_action: Document five qualified prospect interviews for any candidate before setting formation_cash_status to clear or committed.
